description_long: This object is a sleek, angular airplane with a sharply pointed nose and a dark, reflective surface. The wings are sharply swept back and integrated into the fuselage, giving it a stealthy, futuristic appearance reminiscent of advanced military aircraft. The cockpit is positioned near the front and is covered by a tinted, streamlined canopy. The tail section features twin vertical stabilizers canted outward, contributing to its aggressive, aerodynamic profile. The body is predominantly dark blue or black with subtle metallic and greenish highlights, and the overall design emphasizes low radar visibility and high speed. No visible landing gear or external engines are apparent, suggesting a design focused on stealth and performance.
description: A dark, angular airplane with swept-back wings, twin canted vertical stabilizers, and a streamlined, tinted cockpit canopy. Its design is sleek and stealthy, with a futuristic, military-inspired appearance.
description_view_0: From above, the sharply pointed nose, swept-back wings, and twin canted vertical stabilizers are clearly visible, highlighting the airplane's stealthy, triangular shape.
description_view_1: The side view emphasizes the low profile, elongated fuselage, and the smooth integration of the cockpit canopy into the body.
description_view_2: From the rear, the twin vertical stabilizers and the broad, flat tail section are prominent, with the angular wing edges visible.
description_view_3: This angled rear view shows the canted stabilizers, the tapering fuselage, and the overall delta-like wing configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept delta configuration with twin outward-canted vertical stabilizers and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: No visible external engines; likely internal jet configuration.
attribute_tail_design: Twin outward-canted vertical stabilizers in a V-tail configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a streamlined, tinted canopy.
